meta.title: About Us | Applied Engineering & Services
meta.description: Learn about our vision, mission, core values, and why we're the trusted partner for heavy industries across Eastern India.

title: ABOUT US
& OUR FOUNDERS
paragraphs: Founded in 2010, Applied Engineering & Services has grown to become Eastern India's premier provider of hydraulic solutions and engineering services. Based in Jamshedpur, the steel capital of India, we serve the heavy industrial sector with precision equipment and expert technical support.

Our journey began with a simple mission: to bridge the gap between global hydraulic technology and local industrial needs. Today, we proudly partner with leading steel plants, power stations, and manufacturing facilities across the region, providing them with world-class equipment and 24/7 service support.

cards.title: OUR VISION
cards.content: To be Eastern India's most trusted engineering partner, recognized for delivering innovative industrial solutions that drive operational excellence. We envision a future where every heavy industry in our region has access to world-class equipment and maintenance support, powered by our commitment to precision and reliability.

cards.title: OUR MISSION
cards.content: To provide exceptional hydraulic and engineering solutions that maximize uptime and productivity for our clients. Through continuous innovation, rigorous quality standards, and unwavering customer focus, we strive to reduce downtime, enhance safety, and deliver measurable value to every partnership we forge.

values.title: SAFETY FIRST
values.description: Uncompromising commitment to workplace safety and zero-incident operations across all projects.

values.title: CUSTOMER FOCUS
values.description: Every solution engineered around client needs with responsive 24/7 support infrastructure.

values.title: INNOVATION & QUALITY
values.description: Continuous improvement mindset with rigorous quality control and modern equipment standards.

values.title: INTEGRITY
values.description: Transparent business practices with honest pricing and ethical partnerships at every level.

values.title: EXCELLENCE
values.description: Pursuit of perfection in every weld, every calibration, and every client interaction.

owners.title: OUR FOUNDERS
owners.description: Meet the visionary leaders behind Applied Engineering & Services

owners.name: Harsh Jain
owners.title: Managing Director & CEO
owners.bio: With over 25 years of experience in industrial engineering, Harsh founded Applied Engineering & Services in 2010 with a vision to bring world-class hydraulic solutions to Eastern India. His expertise in heavy machinery and commitment to quality has established the company as a trusted partner for major industrial players across the region.

owners.name: Hemant Prakash
owners.title: Co-Founder & Operations Director
owners.bio: Hemant brings 20 years of operational excellence and strategic planning to the organization. His background in supply chain management and customer relations has been instrumental in building lasting partnerships with global brands and ensuring seamless service delivery to clients.

features.title: STRATEGIC LOCATION
features.description: Based in Jamshedpur, the steel capital of India, providing rapid deployment and localized support to major industrial hubs.

features.title: PREMIUM EQUIPMENT
features.description: Fleet of calibrated hydraulic jacks and pumps maintained to manufacturer specifications with full certification.

features.title: EXPERT TECHNICIANS
features.description: Factory-trained engineers with decades of combined experience in heavy machinery maintenance and repair.

features.title: 24/7 AVAILABILITY
features.description: Emergency response teams ready to deploy critical equipment and personnel at any hour to minimize downtime.

features.title: GLOBAL PARTNERSHIPS
features.description: Direct relationships with international manufacturers ensuring authentic parts and warranty support.

features.title: TURNKEY SOLUTIONS
features.description: End-to-end project management from equipment supply through installation, commissioning, and ongoing maintenance.
